mapper.sql: usage_type_id, code, name, display_order, min_usage_days, max_usage_days, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO usage_type (usage_type_id, code, name, display_order, min_usage_days, max_usage_days, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{usageTypeId}, #{code}, #{name}, #{displayOrder}, #{minUsageDays}, #{maxUsageDays}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE usage_type SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, min_usage_days = #{minUsageDays}, max_usage_days = #{maxUsageDays}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE usage_type_id = #{usageTypeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM usage_type WHERE usage_type_id = #{usageTypeId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM usage_type WHERE code = #{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT FROM usage_type WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY display_order NULLS LAST, code LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM usage_type WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND code ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{code}, '%')
AND name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
